title: Positive flow: Search for a restaurant by entering a zip code
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the main interface
test_steps: Enter '94010' in the input field | Tap the search icon in the header/app bar
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in the 94010 area

title: Negative flow: Search with an invalid zip code
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the main interface
test_steps: Enter '12345' in the input field | Tap the search icon in the header/app bar
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the zip code is invalid

title: Boundary validation: Search with a valid zip code
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the main interface
test_steps: Enter '94010' in the input field | Tap the search icon in the header/app bar
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in the 94010 area

title: Toggles state: Selecting a place type
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the main interface
test_steps: Tap on the 'Restaurant' icon in the place type selection grid | Enter '94010' in the input field | Tap the search icon in the header/app bar
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in the 94010 area

title: Navigation: Navigating to a recently viewed place
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the main interface
test_steps: Tap on the 'Cafe Express' thumbnail in the Recently Viewed Places section | Enter '94010' in the input field | Tap the search icon in the header/app bar
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in the 94010 area
